name: Convergence Training Safety LMS API
what_it_does: Convergence Training (Vector Solutions brand) Safety LMS and eLearning REST API for industrial safety and compliance training management. Enables AI agents to manage OSHA, EPA, and regulatory compliance training assignment for industrial safety automation, handle training completion and certification tracking for workforce safety compliance, access industry-specific course catalog (oil and gas, manufacturing, construction) for targeted training automation, retrieve training progress and completion reporting for safety compliance dashboard, manage assessment and competency verification for qualified worker confirmation, handle multi-language training delivery for diverse industrial workforce, access hazardous material and chemical safety (GHS/SDS) training for industrial compliance, retrieve safety observation and incident prevention training for EHS program, manage contractor workforce training qualification for supply chain safety, and integrate with HRIS, EHS platforms, and LMS aggregators.
use_cases: Assigning OSHA compliance training from EHS agents
Tracking industrial safety certifications from compliance agents
Training contractors on site safety from supply chain agents
Reporting workforce training completion from EHS dashboard agents
not_for: Academic education without industrial safety focus
Non-industrial businesses without EHS training requirements
Consumer safety training without employer compliance context
best_when: An industrial employer (oil and gas, manufacturing, mining, construction) using Convergence Training wants AI agents to automate OSHA compliance training, workforce safety certification, contractor training qualification, and regulatory training compliance.
avoid_when: OSHA HANDS-ON TRAINING SUBSTITUTION: Many OSHA standards require documented hands-on or in-person training that cannot be satisfied by eLearning alone (confined space entry, fall protection harness fitting, respiratory protection fit testing, LOTO); automated eLearning completion records for standards requiring practical demonstration create regulatory noncompliance. Process Safety Management (PSM) training — automated PSM training under OSHA 29 CFR 1910.119 requires documented initial training and refresher training for covered processes; automated training completion without supervisor verification of understanding creates PSM compliance gap. Oil and gas specific requirements — automated training for BSEE-regulated offshore facilities, OPA 90, and SPCC must comply with federal agency-specific requirements; generic industrial training automation without regulatory specificity creates compliance gap.

auth.notes: Convergence Training uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Post Falls, Idaho HQ. Founded 1989. Part of Vector Solutions (Leeds Equity Partners). Industrial safety eLearning specialist. 800+ industrial customers. Oil and gas, mining, manufacturing, and construction focus. Competes with SafetyCulture, Intelex, and National Safety Compliance for industrial safety training.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user or per-course subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user or per-course access pricing
pricing.notes: Post Falls, Idaho. Vector Solutions subsidiary (Leeds Equity). Founded 1989. 800+ industrial customers. Industrial safety eLearning. Competes with SafetyCulture and Intelex.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; limited documentation

known_agent_gotchas: OSHA HANDS-ON TRAINING REQUIREMENTS: Automated eLearning cannot satisfy OSHA standards requiring practical demonstration; regulatory automation must identify standards requiring in-person training (confined space, fall protection fit check, LOTO, respiratory fit testing) and exclude from eLearning-only completion

PSM process safety training verification — automated training for OSHA PSM-covered processes must include supervisor verification of employee understanding; automated completion records without competency verification create PSM compliance gap

Oil and gas BSEE regulatory specificity — automated offshore facility training must comply with BSEE-specific training requirements for OCS operations; generic safety training automation without offshore regulatory specificity creates BSEE compliance gap
No webhooks — training completion and certification events require polling; no native push for training due date, completion, or expired certification events
API key only — no OAuth; compromised API key provides full training system access; implement key rotation and limit key exposure

Limited API documentation — Convergence Training API documentation is limited compared to modern API-first platforms; expect to test API behavior empirically and validate against current system behavior
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial safety training. SOC2. API key only. US. Employee training and safety data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Safety training. SOC2. API key. US. Employee safety and training data.
